entities.description: bookrag is a system or product being evaluated for its effectiveness and efficiency in retrieval and qa tasks
kg refers to a high quality knowledge graph  identified as a key feature contributing to the system s performance
the agent based retrieval mechanism is a key feature of the system validated for its critical contributions
retrieval recall is a metric used to measure the performance of the system
qa accuracy is a metric used to measure the performance of the system
three widely adopted datasets are the data sources used to conduct extensive experiments and validate the system
state of the art baselines are the existing systems against which bookrag is compared in the experiments

relations.description: bookrag utilizes a high quality kg as a key feature contributing to its performance
bookrag employs an agent based retrieval mechanism as a key feature contributing to its performance
bookrag achieves superior performance in retrieval recall as demonstrated by experimental results
bookrag achieves superior performance in qa accuracy as demonstrated by experimental results
the high quality kg is a feature that contributes to the performance in retrieval recall
the agent based retrieval mechanism is a feature that contributes to the performance in qa accuracy
bookrag is extensively experimented upon using three widely adopted datasets to validate its effectiveness
bookrag is compared against several state of the art baselines to demonstrate its superior performance
the three widely adopted datasets are used to measure the retrieval recall performance of the system
the three widely adopted datasets are used to measure the qa accuracy performance of the system
state of the art baselines are evaluated on retrieval recall to compare against bookrag
state of the art baselines are evaluated on qa accuracy to compare against bookrag
